exploration.title: Atlas Synthesis — Current State <-> Goals/Vision Grounding
openQuestions: Launch the two graduated goal packets: build goals/epistemic-claim-lifecycle-gate FIRST (the reusable boundary), then goals/law-practice-office-action-spike (the IP-law vertical + loop).
Continue the outcome-decomposition: the verticals/goals AFTER office-action review (intake, drafting, contract review) once the loop turns once.
